title: CarpetEnchants
description: Stop carpets from blocking bookshelf enchantment!
body:
## Purpose:
**Stop carpets (Wool and Moss) from blocking bookshelf enchantment power!**

**Don't you hate it when you're just decorating your enchantment room, and you just vibe with moss carpets next to your table? Well. You don't have to leave your enchantment floor naked anymore.**

If you intented to use this mod in a multiplayer server, you won't need your players to have it too. Just one copy in the server-mods and the effect should apply for all players.
